# Copilot Session Bootstrap

Always start by reading:

- [docs/PROJECT_CONTEXT.md](../docs/PROJECT_CONTEXT.md)
- [docs/CHANGELOG.md](../docs/CHANGELOG.md)

When implementing changes:

- Append an entry to [docs/CHANGELOG.md](../docs/CHANGELOG.md)
- Keep [docs/PROJECT_CONTEXT.md](../docs/PROJECT_CONTEXT.md) current (resource names, endpoints, status)
- Prefer existing scripts in [scripts](../scripts)
